content_body:
When you think of escaping to a luxury cabin rental, a few images may spark your imagination. Rocking chairs overlooking majestic mountain views, an outdoor fire surrounded by swaying pine trees, or the sounds of a nearby creek or river adding a soundtrack for your getaway. One thing they all have in common: seclusion.

With our secluded cabin rentals in Blue Ridge, your romantic retreat or family getaway will gain a new level of memorability. Feel a million miles away while being only ~10-25 minutes from downtown Blue Ridge and just 90 miles north of Atlanta. 

How Secluded Is Secluded?

Everyone has different definitions and expectations of privacy while on vacation, and we're here to help pair you with the perfect cabin for your needs. Our luxury cabins in the woods are located in prime locations for experiencing Blue Ridge, so you are never too far from the action. These private North Georgia vacation rentals hold the perfect balance between not seeing any neighbors and not feeling like you are on your own island. 

The Best Secluded Cabins in Blue Ridge, GA

Aska Escape Lodge

Located in the heart of the Aska Adventure Area, this 3-bedroom cabin rental near the Toccoa River feels like your own private lodge in the woods. With a game room, outdoor fireplace, and room for everyone, it’s the perfect place for togetherness in a wooded area. The best part: it is within walking distance of The Lilly Pad Village, which is one of the best kid-friendly activities in Blue Ridge. 

Cherokee Sunrise on Noontootla Creek

Wake up to the gentle sights and sounds of 25 acres, a private pond, and the Noontootla Creek just outside your door. This creekside cabin rental in Blue Ridge is a favorite for guided fly fishing, sipping morning coffee on the screened-in porch, and relaxing under the stars by the fire pit. The history of the 100-year old farmhouse will make you feel a world away without sacrificing any comforts. 

Chase Mountain Dreams

This wooded view cabin rental sits tucked away in a cocoon of oak trees, and its three separate screened-in porches add to the quiet bliss. With mostly paved access and more amenities than you could dream of, Chase Mountain Dreams boasts seclusion at its finest. 

Cohutta Sunset

Overlooking the Cohutta Wilderness with its panoramic mountain views, Cohutta Sunset will make you feel like royalty. This private mountain-view cabin in Blue Ridge is perfect for guests who want a true off-the-beaten-path cabin experience in North Georgia—with nearby access to horseback riding and sunsets that radiate throughout the whole cabin. 

Privacy With Lavish Comforts 

While these secluded North Georgia cabins feel worlds away, you’re never without luxury. From high-speed Wi-Fi and smart TVs to hot tubs and game rooms, each cabin blends the rustic nature of the mountains with the opulent amenities.

Blue Ridge Memories

"This is our 3rd rental with Cabin Rentals of Georgia and it did not disappoint. We enjoyed a 4 night stay in the Aska Escape Lodge. It was so clean, well stocked, and fully furnished with comfortable, well thought out furnishings. The cabin was far enough off the road to experience the serenity of the mountains but easily accessible to the town of Blue Ridge. We loved this cabin and hope it’s not long before we can return." ~ Aska Escape Lodge

"Charming home with amazing views of the mountains and nestled away from civilization. The warm interiors were balanced by the openness of the windows on the west side of the house. We enjoyed sitting on the balcony and really appreciated the holiday decorations as we celebrated Christmas as a family. We will definitely be back again as this cabin has everything you need and is just as advertised." ~ Cohutta Sunset

Reserve Your Private Cabin Rental in Blue Ridge Today

Our secluded cabin rentals in Blue Ridge, GA are your answer for space, stillness, and a reset just 90 miles north of Atlanta. Browse our collection of luxury cabins and find the place that feels like it was made just for you.
title: Secluded Cabin Rentals: Hidden Gems in Blue Ridge
